subject: fix(export): use correct physical dimensions for print PDF formats
body:
Print formats (A3/A4/A5) are defined at 150 DPI. Using 1:1 pixel-to-point
mapping made their PDFs physically too large (e.g. A4 was 17.2×24.4in
instead of 8.27×11.69in). Now uses 72/150 conversion for print category
so PDFs print at correct paper sizes (A4=595×842pt, matching ISO standard).

Digital formats (social, web, banner) keep 1:1 mapping to avoid the
viewer resampling that was degrading vignette quality.

Tags: export, pdf, print
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: patch

title: use correct physical dimensions for print PDF formats
